claim: AI can compare products and suggest alternatives based on specified criteria like battery runtime, suction power, and filtration
actionable: Use ChatGPT to ask for comparable products and follow-up questions about budget and preferences to narrow options
source_title: 24 NEW Things You Should Be Using AI For...

claim: AI can research product release schedules and timing to recommend optimal purchase windows for tech products with frequent updates
actionable: Ask AI for release dates of past versions, differences between generations, and predicted next release to determine if now is good time to buy
source_title: 24 NEW Things You Should Be Using AI For...

claim: AI can diagnose tech support issues by analyzing manual information and providing systematic troubleshooting steps
actionable: Take photos of error indicators, describe the issue to AI with device model, and iterate through suggested fixes
source_title: 24 NEW Things You Should Be Using AI For...

claim: AI can identify insects from photos and provide information about their behavior, seasonal patterns, and whether they pose risks
actionable: Upload a clear photo of the insect to Claude or ChatGPT and ask for identification and behavioral information
source_title: 24 NEW Things You Should Be Using AI For...

claim: AI can generate custom document templates based on analyzing multiple past examples of similar documents
actionable: In Gemini, upload 3+ similar past documents, specify desired sections and new approach, and ask AI to create template for future use
source_title: 24 NEW Things You Should Be Using AI For...

claim: Chat-based AI can sync with Google Calendar and create event links when direct API connections fail
actionable: If AI cannot directly add to Google Calendar, have it generate a link with event details (date, time, attendees) that you can click to add
source_title: 24 NEW Things You Should Be Using AI For...

claim: AI can help refine Airbnb searches with multiple criteria by acting as a travel booking assistant and iterating on recommendations
actionable: Connect Claude to Airbnb connector and specify location, dates, price range, host rating, parking, and view requirements in natural language
source_title: 24 NEW Things You Should Be Using AI For...

claim: Gemini with Google Maps integration can research restaurants matching specific criteria and plot them on an interactive map
actionable: Give Gemini a route and specific restaurant criteria (cuisine type, noise level), and ask it to research options and plot them on map
source_title: 24 NEW Things You Should Be Using AI For...

claim: AI can create custom GPTs that specialize in specific tasks like generating optimal prompts for text-to-video models
actionable: Create a custom ChatGPT with best practices for a specific tool (like Sora), then give it rough descriptions and it will draft perfect prompts
source_title: 24 NEW Things You Should Be Using AI For...

claim: Notebook LM can create animated picture books and audio podcasts from complex documents like research papers
actionable: Upload PDF or document to Notebook LM, select visual style, specify focus areas, and generate video with animated visuals and AI hosts discussing content
source_title: 24 NEW Things You Should Be Using AI For...

claim: Gemini 2.5 Pro can watch full videos frame-by-frame and answer detailed questions about visual content despite not using transcript
actionable: Upload videos up to 30-40 minutes to Gemini 2.5 Pro in AI Studio and ask questions about specific visual details, colors, or objects
source_title: 24 NEW Things You Should Be Using AI For...

claim: HeyGen video translation syncs mouth movements to translated audio when dubbing videos into other languages
actionable: Use HeyGen's video translate feature to upload videos and select target language for automatic dubbing with lip-sync
source_title: 24 NEW Things You Should Be Using AI For...
